project: VERA: Verified Erasure under Reweighting Ambiguity

parent_pilot.use: Exploratory power and estimand diagnostics only; excluded from every confirmatory estimate, interval, test, and abstract number.

primary_claim: For a fixed finite family of representation edits, VERA controls the probability of selecting any edit that violates at least one target or balanced-leakage contract under the preregistered bounded within-stratum reweighting model; it abstains when no edit passes or when deployment support is absent.
novelty_boundary: Candidate-wise intersection-union testing, finite-family multiplicity control, Clopper-Pearson bounds, CVaR, and bounded-density-ratio risk control are standard. The proposed contribution is a support-aware representation-erasure contract that combines environment-conditional paired target harm, source-prior-invariant balanced leakage, a vector shift envelope, and a matching support-mismatch impossibility boundary. Learn Then Test and distribution-free risk-control overlap must be explicit in the paper.

exact_synthetic_study.target_sampling: Fixed equal environment counts floor(validation_size / 3) in each of three environments.
exact_synthetic_study.source_sampling: Fixed equal class counts floor(validation_size / 2) for each attacker; this isolates class-conditional balanced leakage from source-prior randomness.
exact_synthetic_study.independence_model: Candidate, environment, attacker, and source-class count vectors are mutually independent under the synthetic law, making the registered abstention probability analytically computable.
exact_synthetic_study.synthetic_selection: When more than one candidate passes, deploy the smallest registered candidate index; error control is selection-rule agnostic over the fixed family.
exact_synthetic_study.multiplicity: Primary fixed-profile VERA uses a candidate-wise intersection-union test at delta divided by 12; each binary-source balanced-leakage component splits its candidate alpha equally across the two class recalls. The simultaneous envelope uses Bonferroni over every candidate-contract pair.
exact_synthetic_study.prediction: Acceptance and abstention probabilities are computed from the registered finite multinomial/binomial law, without fitted parameters, and compared with independent Monte Carlo replicates.
exact_synthetic_study.pass_condition: For every validation-size, delta, and gamma cell: the simultaneous 95% Clopper-Pearson upper bound on empirical false acceptance is at most delta, and observed abstention is inside the simultaneous 95% exact prediction interval. The observed abstention-versus-size curve and exact prediction must be overlaid in the paper.

real_study.split_policy: Group-stratify official train into 80% eraser-train and 20% construction before caps; use untouched official validation for certification; lock official external/test until all selections are complete.
real_study.preprocessing: Standardize from eraser-train only and fit randomized PCA from eraser-train only.

contracts.target: Maximum environment-conditional mean paired increase in zero-one target loss versus the identity edit.
contracts.leakage: For every preregistered attacker, leakage is one half of the robust class-conditional recall for source class 0 plus one half of the robust class-conditional recall for source class 1. It is therefore invariant to source-class prior shift and equals 0.5 for a constant binary attacker.
contracts.primary_multiplicity: Each candidate is an intersection-union test: every component contract must reject violation at alpha delta/12. A union bound over the 12 registered candidates controls selection of any unsafe candidate. No multiplicity penalty across component contracts is required for the intersection-union test; each balanced-leakage component splits its candidate alpha across two class recalls.
contracts.envelope_multiplicity: The reported post-selection shift envelope uses simultaneous Bonferroni coverage over every registered candidate-contract pair.
contracts.confidence: Exact one-sided Clopper-Pearson bounds for binary class recalls and exact positive-upper/negative-lower Clopper-Pearson bounds for paired {-1,0,1} target harm.
contracts.shift_model: Target contracts permit arbitrary changes in environment mixture weights and bound the within-environment deployment-to-certification density ratio by Gamma. Balanced leakage fixes source-class weights at one half and separately bounds each within-source-class density ratio by Gamma. The guarantee applies to any external law satisfying these support and density-ratio assumptions; benchmark external results test, but do not prove, assumption membership.
contracts.support_rule: A declared deployment environment absent from certification, or a missing source class required by balanced leakage, makes the contract non-identifiable and forces VERA to abstain. Camelyon17 center 2 is the preregistered unsupported case and its external balanced leakage is reported as NA.

real_study.selection_utility: Among candidates eligible for a rule, minimize maximum validation balanced leakage, then maximum environment-conditional paired target harm, then the stable candidate key.
real_study.external_evaluation: After every representation, probe, attacker, candidate, and rule is fixed, evaluate the same target and balanced-leakage contracts on the untouched external split. External balanced leakage is NA when either source class is absent. Naive deployment into a preregistered unsupported environment is counted separately as procedurally unsupported, not relabeled as a measured contract violation.

analysis_tiers.primary: Full certification fraction, Gamma=1.0, all nine registered threshold pairs, seeds 5-12 only.
analysis_tiers.shifted_sensitivity: Full certification fraction, Gamma=1.01, identical rules and thresholds; no alternate Gamma may replace it.
analysis_tiers.learning_curve: All five validation fractions at Gamma=1.0. Nested subsets are generated by stratifying on target, source, and environment, shuffling each stratum with seed 2027071300 + 1009 * algorithmic_seed + sum of Unicode code points in the dataset name, and taking the first max(1, floor(fraction * stratum_n)) observations; false acceptance and abstention are reported versus realized certification n.
analysis_tiers.envelope: For every candidate and threshold pair, report the simultaneous lower-certified common Gamma radius up to the fixed cap of 8.0.
analysis_tiers.pilot_exclusion: Seeds 0-4 and every statistic used to select this protocol are excluded from confirmatory estimates and hypothesis tests.

headline_stress_family.selection_disclosure: Chosen before seeds 5-12 from the corrected-estimand seeds 0-4 pilot because these fixed regimes exposed validation-only failures; it is a prespecified confirmatory stress family, not an outcome-blind benchmark average.

statistical_tests.primary_false_acceptance_unit: Preregistered dataset/seed/threshold configuration at full certification size; Camelyon17 is excluded from measured-violation denominators because balanced leakage is not externally estimable.
statistical_tests.seed_blocked_comparison: Within each supported dataset and seed, average the nine paired indicators point-selection violation minus VERA-IUT violation. Use an exact one-sided sign-flip test for positive improvement, then Holm correct over the four externally estimable datasets.
statistical_tests.configuration_comparison: Report exact paired McNemar tests as descriptive sensitivity only because threshold configurations share seed blocks.
statistical_tests.intervals: Report 95% Clopper-Pearson intervals for measured false acceptance, deployment probability, and safe retention. The preregistered pass/fail error-control criterion uses measured rates because the theorem controls repeated-sample selection probability rather than a confidence upper bound on the finite benchmark frequency.
statistical_tests.learning_curve_overlay: For the exact synthetic study, require every observed abstention rate to lie in its simultaneous exact prediction interval. For real data, overlay observed nested-subset abstention with the preregistered plug-in exact prediction based on the full certification empirical law and label this overlay as calibration, not independent confirmation.

pass_conditions.naive_failure: At least one supported dataset and threshold pair has point-selection measured external contract violation at or above 20% across the eight untouched seeds.
pass_conditions.vera_control: VERA-IUT measured external false acceptance is at most delta globally and within every externally estimable dataset in the primary analysis; the same must hold for the fixed Gamma=1.01 sensitivity. Camelyon17 must always abstain procedurally.
pass_conditions.retention: Primary VERA-IUT retains at least 30% of configurations where the external oracle finds a certifiable edit and deploys on at least three supported datasets.
pass_conditions.shift_envelope: The simultaneous envelope has zero measured external violations and certifies Gamma at least 1.01 on at least two supported datasets.
pass_conditions.paired_significance: At least one supported dataset has Holm-corrected one-sided seed-blocked sign-flip p <= 0.05 for point selection versus VERA-IUT; all four adjusted p-values are reported regardless of outcome.
pass_conditions.abstract_gap: Within the 32 prespecified headline-stress configurations, point-selection minus VERA-IUT measured false acceptance is at least 15 percentage points. The abstract must identify this as a prespecified stress family, give the denominator, and regenerate the sentence directly from the receipt-backed analysis artifact.
pass_conditions.theory_match: The exact balanced synthetic study passes every registered prediction and false-acceptance cell; the real learning-curve calibration overlay is shown without being promoted to independent confirmatory evidence.
pass_conditions.receipt_matrix: Every one of 5 datasets x 5 methods x 8 untouched seeds has a valid official-code receipt, per-example arrays, the confirmatory preregistration hash, and no proxy row.

data_policy.external_data_used_for_protocol_design: Only seeds 0-4 were inspected for protocol design; all seed 5-12 split draws, fitted edits, probe predictions, attacker predictions, and external outcomes were untouched at lock time.
data_policy.stopping_rule: Run and report all 200 preregistered dataset-method-seed cells. No early stopping, seed replacement, threshold replacement, or Gamma replacement is allowed after the first confirmatory cell begins.
